[2018-03-07 19:24] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): MagnetRing (1.2):
Supply: 4. Cost: 8BBEE
4 HP. Prompt Blocker.
Special: Pierced with 2 Damage. Block uses Energy. Max 12 total Absorb.
[2018-03-07 19:24] jamesa7171: @StrShPlyr

1. I appreciate that you've put effort into these new units and that you would like people to comment on them, but please don't interrupt on-going conversations in other channels in order to bring people here. Everybody can see that there are new messages here and they will comment on your units if they wish to.

2. Shadowfang was nerfed from 6RRR and 7RRR in the past; while I am not enough of an expert to understand the nuances of Shadowfang's balance, it seems unlikely that reverting back to 7RRR is correct or justified.

3. A lot of your new units introduce entirely new game mechanics which can significantly complicate the board state. Lunarch's unit design philosophy (which you can read a tl;dr version of at #4 here: http://blog.prismata.net/2014/08/26/10-prismata-design-questions/) includes the idea that Prismata's game mechanics should be as simple and easy-to-understand as possible. It seems to me like your most recent units do not abide by this principle, and while that is not inherently a bad thing it is a possible reason why people are not commenting on your units as they really don't fit the "feel" of Prismata.
10 Common Prismata Game Design Questions
The Prismata game design team covers everything from "when will I get a beta key" to fundamental game design questions.
[2018-03-07 19:25] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Prevents sniping by Apollo.
[2018-03-07 19:26] Deleted User (Deleted User): Honestly though? just wait 1 day for release, then more people are likely to want to discuss this as well
[2018-03-07 19:26] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): The MR can be restatted.
[2018-03-07 19:31] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): MagnetRing (1.3r):
Supply: 4. Cost: 8BBEE
2 HP. Prompt Blocker.
Special: Build another if Destroyed, Buildtime 1, max 6 times. Block uses Energy to work
[2018-03-07 19:33] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): It doesn't add more than Energy Block then.

messages.author: jamesa7171
messages.content:
@StrShPlyr

1. I appreciate that you've put effort into these new units and that you would like people to comment on them, but please don't interrupt on-going conversations in other channels in order to bring people here. Everybody can see that there are new messages here and they will comment on your units if they wish to.

2. Shadowfang was nerfed from 6RRR and 7RRR in the past; while I am not enough of an expert to understand the nuances of Shadowfang's balance, it seems unlikely that reverting back to 7RRR is correct or justified.

3. A lot of your new units introduce entirely new game mechanics which can significantly complicate the board state. Lunarch's unit design philosophy (which you can read a tl;dr version of at #4 here: http://blog.prismata.net/2014/08/26/10-prismata-design-questions/) includes the idea that Prismata's game mechanics should be as simple and easy-to-understand as possible. It seems to me like your most recent units do not abide by this principle, and while that is not inherently a bad thing it is a possible reason why people are not commenting on your units as they really don't fit the "feel" of Prismata.
10 Common Prismata Game Design Questions
The Prismata game design team covers everything from "when will I get a beta key" to fundamental game design questions.
